2604.27102.title: Anomaly Detection in Soil Heavy Metal Contamination Using Unsupervised Learning for Environmental Risk Assessment
2604.27102.paper_summary: Soil contamination by heavy metals poses a persistent environmental and public health concern in rapidly urbanising regions of Ghana, particularly at unregulated waste disposal sites. This study applies an unsupervised machine learning framework to detect and characterise anomalous heavy metal contamination patterns in soils from twelve waste sites and residential controls in the Central Region, of Ghana. Concentrations of eight metals (As, Cd, Cr, Cu, Hg, Ni, Pb, Zn) were analysed alongside standard health risk indices, including the Hazard Index (HI) and Incremental Lifetime Cancer Risk (ILCR). Isolation Forest and PCA reconstruction error each identified $12$ anomalous samples ($15.4\%$ of $78$ samples), while DBSCAN detected no density-isolated noise points. A consensus approach isolated six robust anomalies ($7.7\%)$, all spatially concentrated at a single site (S3). Anomalies exhibited approximately $70$--$80\%$ higher mean HI values than normal samples, with all consensus anomalies exceeding the HI$=1$ threshold. PCA reconstruction error showed a strong positive association with HI ($r \approx 0.8$), indicating consistency between multivariate deviation and health risk. Three distinct anomaly types were identified: extreme Cu enrichment at S3, anomalously low Ni at S4/S5, and moderate multi-metal (Pb--Zn) co-elevation at S9--S12. The results demonstrate that unsupervised machine learning provides granular, objective insight beyond aggregate indices, enabling targeted site prioritisation and risk-informed environmental management.
2604.27102.paper_summary_zh: 土壤受到重金屬污染在加納快速城市化地區，特別是在未受管制的廢物處置場，構成了一個持續的環境和公共健康問題。本研究應用無監督機器學習框架來檢測和特徵化來自加納中央地區十二個廢物場和住宅對照的土壤中異常的重金屬污染模式。分析了八種金屬（As、Cd、Cr、Cu、Hg、Ni、Pb、Zn）的濃度，以及包括危害指數（HI）和增量終生癌症風險（ILCR）在內的標準健康風險指數。孤立森林和PCA重建誤差各自識別了$12$個異常樣本（$15.4\%$的$78$個樣本），而DBSCAN未檢測到任何密度孤立的噪聲點。一個共識方法孤立了六個穩健的異常（$7.7\%$），這些異常都集中在一個地點（S3）。異常的平均HI值比正常樣本高出約$70$--$80\%$，所有共識異常都超過了HI$=1$的閾值。PCA重建誤差與HI顯示出強正相關（$r \approx 0.8$），表明多變量偏差與健康風險之間的一致性。識別出了三種類型的異常：S3的極端Cu富集、S4/S5的異常低Ni，以及S9--S12的中等多金屬（Pb--Zn）共升高。結果顯示，無監督機器學習提供了超越聚合指數的細緻、客觀的見解，使得能夠針對性地優先考慮場地並進行風險知情的環境管理。
2604.27102.author: Isaac Tettey Adjokatse et.al.
2604.27102.authors: Isaac Tettey Adjokatse, Samuel Senyo Koranteng, George Yamoah Afrifa, Theophilus Ansah-Narh, Marcellin Atemkeng, Joseph Bremang Tandoh, Kow Ahor Essel-Yorke, Richmond Opoku-Sarkodie, Rebecca Davis
